_comment: ComfyUI reverse-proxy + coexistence settings (see handle_comfyui_proxy in llama_priority_proxy.py). Delete this file to disable the feature entirely -- routes under /comfyui then return 503. base_url must be reachable from this proxy's own container (ComfyUI's compose service needs its port published to the host, e.g. '127.0.0.1:8188:8188', since it isn't by default). coexist_scenario names the scenario (see config/scenario_comfy_coexist.json) activated the moment a generation starts.
